span.p:
fleet fetch <id> — report wrapped
in UNTRUSTED banner; fleet logs /
fleet patch for transcript + diff

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Escalate a tier and
redispatch — never retry
at the same tier

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Engineer's OWN judgment decides —
never auto-dispatch a drone's
suggestion; consequential calls
go to the captain

span.p:
fleet patch <id> → apply to the
real repo, verify (build/test/run),
commit — plain message, NO push
